rootCause: Playwright preview reused a stale Astro build because ensure-astro-build.mjs only checked for the server entrypoint and skipped rebuilding when the dist/client/_astro directory was missing, so the preview server returned 404s for client bundles.
resolution: Updated ensure-astro-build.mjs to verify both server and client assets exist before skipping a rebuild and added tests that fail when client bundles are absent.
